@graph.headline: The Market Access Strategy: Why Your Sales Funnel Is an Access Barrier
@graph.description: How changing a state law and screening second graders taught me that revenue growth is a system of empathy, not just a series of closings.

mainEntity.name: What is a Market Access Strategy?

acceptedAnswer.text: A Market Access Strategy is a deliberate design of how your business removes the friction that prevents your ideal customer from reaching you. It often involves identifying legislative, technical, or psychological barriers that your competitors are ignoring.

mainEntity.name: How does volume vs. margin affect small business growth?

acceptedAnswer.text: As noted in the Bain (2018) research, small business owners often rely on 'gut feelings' about which customers are valuable. A high-margin customer who is difficult to access is often less valuable over the long term than a high-volume population that can be served through an efficient, automated system.

mainEntity.name: Why is social media presence important for a 'Unified' engine?

acceptedAnswer.text: Because it is the modern 'school screening.' It's where your prospects are learning and researching before they ever speak to you. A Unified engine ensures that your team's individual presence and your corporate assets are working in the same direction.
